mapper.insert:
insert into ea_rag_chunk ( rag_source_id, owner_user_id, project_id, session_id, source_type, source_id, chunk_num, chunk_text, page_no, section_path, vector_collection, vector_point_id, embedding_model_code, embedding_version, embedding_dimension, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted ) values
( #{item.ragSourceId}, #{item.ownerUserId}, #{item.projectId}, #{item.sessionId}, #{item.sourceType}, #{item.sourceId}, #{item.chunkNum}, #{item.chunkText}, #{item.pageNo}, #{item.sectionPath}, #{item.vectorCollection}, #{item.vectorPointId}, #{item.embeddingModelCode}, #{item.embeddingVersion}, #{item.embeddingDimension}, #{item.createdBy}, current_timestamp(6), #{item.updatedBy}, current_timestamp(6), 0 )
